label: BSP均匀切分
description: 对区域外接矩形做 BSP 二叉空间剖分递归切分：每次在可切方向上于「全区间均匀」处下刀（切分点在 [base+minSize, end-minSize-pathWidth] 内均匀采样），两子区之间留出 pathWidth 格作为通道。每个 BSP 叶子矩形输出一张独立 0/1 网格（按生成序：深度优先、先 a 后 b），叶子之间的通道与被裁掉的边角合并成一张 gap 网格。可横切条件 h≥minSize*2+pathWidth、可纵切条件 w≥minSize*2+pathWidth；当两向都不可切或达到 maxDepth 时该矩形作为叶子。
description-en: Recursively partitions a region's bounding box via BSP (Binary Space Partition), cutting at a uniformly-sampled position across the whole splittable range (the cut lands in [base+minSize, end-minSize-pathWidth]) and leaving a pathWidth-wide channel between the two halves. Each BSP leaf rectangle is emitted as its own 0/1 grid (in generation order: depth-first, a-before-b); the inter-leaf channels and clipped corners are merged into one gap grid. Horizontal cut requires h≥minSize*2+pathWidth, vertical cut requires w≥minSize*2+pathWidth; a rectangle becomes a leaf when neither cut is possible or maxDepth is reached.
icon: 深色背景上一个矩形被两到三刀递归切成大小不一的小矩形，刀缝之间留出细通道，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；叶子只落在非零有效格内。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; leaves fall only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: minSize
inputs.label: 最小边长
inputs.description: 叶子在任一方向上的最小边长（格），最小 1。决定可切阈值：某方向尺寸 ≥ minSize*2+pathWidth 才可在该方向切分。
inputs.description-en: Minimum leaf edge length along either axis (in cells), minimum 1. Sets the split threshold: an axis is splittable only when its size ≥ minSize*2+pathWidth.

inputs.name: pathWidth
inputs.label: 通道宽度
inputs.description: 两子区之间留出的通道宽度（格），最小 0。通道格归入 gap 输出，不属于任何叶子。
inputs.description-en: Channel width (in cells) left between the two halves of each split, minimum 0. Channel cells go to the gap output and belong to no leaf.

inputs.name: maxDepth
inputs.label: 最大深度
inputs.description: BSP 递归最大深度；达到该深度的矩形直接作为叶子，不再切分。
inputs.description-en: Maximum BSP recursion depth; a rectangle reaching this depth becomes a leaf and is not split further.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子（决定每刀切向与切分点），0 使用当前时间。
inputs.description-en: Random seed (drives each cut's direction and position); 0 uses the current timestamp.

outputs.name: partition
outputs.label: 叶子列表
outputs.description: 每个 BSP 叶子矩形一张 0/1 网格，按生成序（深度优先、先 a 后 b）；被掩码截没的空叶子自动剔除。
outputs.description-en: One 0/1 grid per BSP leaf rectangle, in generation order (depth-first, a-before-b); empty leaves clipped away by the mask are dropped.

outputs.name: gap
outputs.label: 通道网格
outputs.description: 所有叶子之间的 pathWidth 通道（含被叶子裁掉的边角）合并成的一张 0/1 网格，与输入同形状。
outputs.description-en: A single 0/1 grid merging all inter-leaf pathWidth channels (and clipped corners); same shape as the input.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 叶子数
outputs.description: 实际切出的非空叶子数量。
